# Perfume Picks

> Perfume Picks is an iOS app for fragrance collectors. It catalogs your
> wardrobe, tracks every wear, gives weather- and occasion-aware picks from
> bottles you already own, and builds a personal taste profile from your
> collection. The app does not sell perfume. It links out to retailer pages
> when users want to buy. Affiliate links are disclosed.

## Site
- [Home](https://perfumepicks.app/): app overview, features, FAQ
- [About](https://perfumepicks.app/about): who runs Perfume Picks, editorial standards, what the app is and is not
- [Articles](https://perfumepicks.app/articles): guides for fragrance collectors (wardrobe care, note theory, layering, season picks)
- [Support](https://perfumepicks.app/support): account deletion, subscription cancellation, troubleshooting
- [Privacy Policy](https://perfumepicks.app/privacy): data collection and handling
- [Terms of Service](https://perfumepicks.app/terms): eligibility, subscriptions, affiliate disclosure
- [Delete Account](https://perfumepicks.app/delete-account): how to permanently delete your account and data

## Optional
- [Sitemap](https://perfumepicks.app/sitemap-index.xml): full URL index updated on every build
